---
title: "nvidia triple monitor works but will restart when i run k9copy or vurtualbox"
date: 2010-11-24
forum: General Help
---

### Post by 65 mustang on 2010-11-24
I have triple monitors working on my 10.10 ubuntu system and they work for most things.  Except k9copy and virtual box will cause x to restart.  glxgears works fine.  What am i missing?

### Post by 65 mustang on 2010-11-24
Changed all my monitors to use 16 bit color.  This got rid of all the WW lines in my xorg.log.  Still has the same crash problem.

### Post by danic on 2010-12-14
I also run triple monitor setup and the two applications that caused X to crash (dropping you back to a login screen) were VirtualBox and VLC. After many hours of searching I found this launchpad bug.
[https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/qt4-x11/+bug/650539]("https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/qt4-x11/+bug/650539").
The suggested work-around did it for me.

---

### Post by 65 mustang on 2010-12-22
I enabled "proposed" updated, rebooted and it solved the problem.  Thanks!  I will updated the bug that it fixed my setup.

---
